text:
/ci2 1 t3 意外と速くて攻撃範囲も広い
中々に厄介な敵さんですねえ。
距離を取るのも大事ですよお。

/ci2 1 t3 It's surprisingly fast and has a
wide attack range... A kinda annoying baddie.
We need to keep our distance when necessary.
